data.body: HANDOFF CORRECTION: epic has 21 children, not 19 — TWO legitimate OPEN children were missing from the handoff's remaining-work list: unclear-verymad-sablefish (remove remaining user-facing deprecations: list_epics CLI+MCP+schema, REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS, --no-sync, lock_backend accept-branch, rebar_id_guard_mode flat-conf key — the surfaces 5274 registered + 7c92 kept; --verdict-hash already removed by 7c92 so that cite is a no-op) and audacious-bairnish-ugandakob (internal-only dead params/shims: acli.py acli_cmd, prompts.py langfuse_cfg, review_bot/adapter.py config, llm/runner.py field, criterion_preview sync shim, code_review/detectors run_security_detectors alias, reducer/_cache pre-v3/v4 branch, mcp_server _mcp_models re-export). Both parent=epic, from the maintainer deprecation sweep. Must implement both to close epic. c244 confirmed reparented OUT (parent=ace2-f784, not epic). Killed premature make-test pre-flight; will run definitive one after these 2 land. Implementing unclear-verymad-sablefish next (stacks on 44be).
